title: Wet Weather Returns to Charlotte
summary: Serene Sunday precedes rain and storm chances Monday, bringing potential heavy rain and stronger storms.
charlotte_impact: Impacts outdoor activities and travel; residents should stay updated on weather alerts.

title: Charlotte Mayoral Race Preparations
summary: Council is weighing considerations before applications open for Charlotte's next mayoral race in 2027.
charlotte_impact: Early stages of the election cycle shape future leadership discussions.

title: Shelby Officer Fired After Use of Force
summary: Shelby officer fired; NC SBI to investigate use of force. Local authorities requested the agency's assistance.
charlotte_impact: Highlights accountability and oversight in law enforcement practices.

title: Shooting in Northeast Charlotte
summary: One person shot on Graypark Drive near Orr Street in northeast Charlotte. Police are investigating.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and potential community impact.

title: Flooding Causes Closures in Union County
summary: Widespread flooding in Union County stranded cars and closed restaurants, impacting daily life.
charlotte_impact: Severe weather events disrupt local businesses and community activities.

title: Fan Remembers Kyle Busch Meeting
summary: Pamela Hauck reflects on her unexpected final meeting with NASCAR legend Kyle Busch before his death.
charlotte_impact: Personal anecdotes provide a glimpse into the impact of public figures.

title: Wrongful Death Suit Filed in Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife files wrongful death lawsuit in plane crash that killed 7 at Statesville Regional Airport.
charlotte_impact: Legal proceedings seek accountability for aviation accidents.

title: CMS Testing Disrupted by Technical Issues
summary: CMS addresses families as technical issues disrupt end-of-year testing, raising concern over student stress.
charlotte_impact: Technical glitches impact student performance and create anxiety.

title: Couple Wins Judgment Against Builder
summary: Denver couple wins $1.6M judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights risks in construction projects and consumer protection measures.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman
summary: 'Disturbing' | Shelby officer suspended for punching woman during arrest. The police officer was not identified.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about police conduct and use of force during arrests.

title: Car Break-ins Plague Clover Neighborhood
summary: 'Again?' Thieves target Clover neighborhood for second time, breaking into multiple vehicles. At least one gun was stolen.
charlotte_impact: Recurring crime patterns increase community anxiety and require increased vigilance.

title: Salisbury Teacher Charged with Sex Offenses
summary: Salisbury teacher turns himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving former student dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Serious allegations of misconduct raise safeguarding concerns in educational settings.

title: Charlotte Douglas Receives FAA Grant
summary: FAA awards Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand airport apron, improving infrastructure and safety.
charlotte_impact: Infrastructure investments enhance airport capacity and regional connectivity.

title: Man Dies After Hit-and-Run in Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent died months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road. Police seek information on the driver.
charlotte_impact: Tragic outcome highlights the need for justice and road safety awareness.

title: Suspect Arrested in Hit-and-Run Case
summary: CMPD arrests hit-and-run suspect after 8-year-old struck by car in south Charlotte on May 9.
charlotte_impact: Accountability in hit-and-run incidents provides some closure for victims and families.
